meaning: n.教皇的职位,主教的地位vi.装作教皇的说话
examples: Politicians like to pontificate about falling standards.
Pope Formosus died after a pontificate of four and a half years.
The central meaning of his pontificate is to restore papal authority.
It will hold conferences around the world to pontificate on various global ills, real or imagined.
For us it's easy to pontificate that the same holds true today with the new Nifty Fifty.
